property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
F:\RJ\JDK\jdk-17_windows-x64_bin\jdk-17.0.10 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;F:\soft\anaconda3;F:\soft\anaconda3\Library\mingw-w64 in;F:\soft\anaconda3\Library\usr in;F:\soft\anaconda3\Library in;F:\soft\anaconda3\Scripts;F:\soft\anaconda3 in;F:\soft\anaconda3\condabin;F:\RJ\JDK\jdk-17_windows-x64_bin\jdk-17.0.10 in;C:\Program Files\dotnet;E:\MySQL80\MySQL Server 8.0 in;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;F:\2-1\webRJ\apache-tomcat-10.1.31-windows-x64\apache-tomcat-10.1.31 in;F:\2-1\webRJ\apache-maven-3.8.1-bin\apache-maven-3.8.1 in;E: fmpeg in;F:\soft\Microsoft VS Code in;F:\RJ\微信web开发者工具\dll;F:\sof;\Rose\common;F:\soft\Redis;F:\soft\Go in;F:\soft\NVM
vm;F:\soft\NVM\NodeJS
odejs;F:\soft
odejs
ode_global;F:\soft lutter in;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;F:\soft\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest in;F:\soft\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;F:\soft\Android\Sdk	ools;F:\soft\Android\Sdk	ools in;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;F:\RJ\Python\Python312\Scripts;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;F:\soft\anaconda3;F:\soft\anaconda3\Scripts;F:\soft\anaconda3\Library in;F:\soft\anaconda3\Library\mingw-w64 in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI;F:\soft\VMware17 in;F:\RJ\JDK\jdk-17_windows-x64_bin\jdk-17.0.10 in;C:\Program Files\dotnet;E:\MySQL80\MySQL Server 8.0 in;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;F:\2-1\webRJ\apache-tomcat-10.1.31-windows-x64\apache-tomcat-10.1.31 in;F:\2-1\webRJ\apache-maven-3.8.1-bin\apache-maven-3.8.1 in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;E: fmpeg in;F:\soft\Microsoft VS Code in;F:\RJ\微信web开发者工具\dll;F:\soft\Rose\common;F:\soft\Redis;F:\soft\Go in;F:\soft\NVM

testcase.name: runtimeExceptionHandler_returnsSystemError
testcase.system-out: 03:09:01.487 [main] ERROR com.backend.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- RuntimeException java.lang.RuntimeException: unexpected at
